steps.title: Use the digital-format goal
steps.content: The student must explain an advantage of the archive being digital. The relevant notes say the ICAA digitized documents, scholars now have greater access, and the documents did not need to be removed from their countries of origin.

steps.title: Reject content-only details
steps.content: Choice A gives the number of documents, Choice C names a kind of document, and Choice D identifies Elena Torres's role. None of those explains the benefit of online access while preserving documents in place. The answer is B.
